scripts.build:expressions: mkdir -p dist && yarn tsc && browserify dist/ts/main.js | terser > dist/expressions.js --mangle && cp package.json dist
scripts.build:expressions:debug: mkdir -p dist && yarn tsc && browserify dist/ts/main.js > dist/expressions.js
scripts.build:sandbox: mkdir -p dist && yarn tsc && browserify dist/ts/expressions-proxy.js | terser > dist/expressions-proxy.js --mangle && cp expressions.html dist/expressions.html
scripts.build:sandbox:debug: mkdir -p dist && yarn tsc && browserify dist/ts/expressions-proxy.js > dist/expressions-proxy.js && cp expressions.html dist/expressions.html
scripts.build:docs: jsdoc -t templates/haruki docs/docs.js -d console > docs/docs.json && jsdoc -t templates/haruki docs/event_docs.js -d console > docs/event_docs.json
scripts.build:help: mkdir -p docs/output/help && mkdir -p docs/output/help/expressions/reference && mkdir -p docs/output/help/events/reference && node script/generate-help.js
scripts.build:dist: yarn clean && yarn build && yarn test && make types
scripts.test: mocha --reporter list --require should test/**/*.js && istanbul report
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist && rm -rf docs/output rm -rf coverage
